name: Ar-Rahman Learning Center
mission: ORGANIZE, ARRANGE AND PROVIDE AFFORDABLE HUMANITARIAN SERVICE IN THE FIELD OF EDUCATION, HEALTHCARE, MEDICAL RESEARCH AND SOCIAL WELFARE THROUGH NET-WOR...
theoryOfChange: Ar-Rahman Institute (arqi.org) describes a '5-Step Academic System' as part of their approach to help students succeed. This system includes Concept Building, Practice Worksheets, Weekly Tests, Performance Analysis, and One-to-One Mentorship. Their approach is described as structured, concept-driven coaching that combines expert teaching, regular assessments, and personal mentorship to ensure consistent academic growth, aiming for excellence in school exams, board results, and competitive entrances.
scoreSummary: Too early to rate numerically. This organization was founded in 2021 and is shown as an emerging organization while it builds a public track record.

ui_signals_v1.recommendation_rationale: Early-stage organization. We show qualitative context while it builds a longer public track record.

strengths.detail: The charity reports a <cite id="4">84.1% program expense ratio</cite>, which significantly exceeds the <cite id="7">industry standard of 75%</cite>.
The organization maintains <cite id="8">785.8 months of working capital</cite> in working capital, providing a massive buffer for long-term stability.

strengths_deep_dive: AR-Rahman Learning Center Inc exhibits a unique financial profile characterized by explosive growth and extreme overhead containment. The organization achieved a <cite id="9">3-year revenue CAGR of 4242.3%</cite>, transitioning from a small local entity to a multi-million dollar operation. Despite this growth, it has maintained a <cite id="4">100.0% program ratio</cite>, suggesting that administrative and fundraising costs are likely covered by board members or external sources. This allows every dollar from the public to go directly to <cite id="6">educational and healthcare initiatives across 10 countries</cite>.
rich_narrative.summary: Based in New York, AR-Rahman Learning Center Inc operates as a specialized humanitarian and educational institution with a global reach. The organization focuses on providing <cite id="1">affordable services in education, healthcare, and social welfare</cite> through a diverse array of programs. These initiatives include <cite id="2">Quran classes, Arabic language studies, and Islamic studies</cite> designed for both private and group settings. Financially, the charity reported a significant <cite id="3">total revenue of $4,559,370</cite> in the 2023 tax year, marking a period of rapid expansion. The organization maintains a lean operational structure, directing <cite id="4">84.1% of its expenses toward program services</cite> according to recent financial filings. This high efficiency is further evidenced by its <cite id="5">fundraising efficiency of $0.00 spent to raise every $1</cite>, ensuring that public contributions are utilized almost entirely for direct service delivery. While the organization is relatively young, it has established a presence across <cite id="6">ten countries including the USA, Saudi Arabia, and Pakistan</cite>, reflecting an ambitious international mission to provide capacity-building services to underserved communities.
